benchmarks.name: pty_to_subscriber_idle
benchmarks.notes: Daemon-internal portion of the PTY->pixel budget. SPEC AC-12 ceiling is 500 us; measured value is ~33x under budget.

benchmarks.name: pty_to_subscriber_load_10
benchmarks.notes: Target pane latency with 9 sibling panes emitting noise concurrently. Default-suite group (AC-6).

benchmarks.name: send_input_latency
benchmarks.notes: SessionManager::write_pty call latency only (no echo wait). Sub-microsecond mutex acquire + PTY fd write.

benchmarks.name: daemon_cold_start
benchmarks.notes: SessionManager::new() + first create_tab(cat). Excludes socket bind (AC-8). SPEC ceiling 500 ms; measured ~17 ms.
